code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    process(line)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9
      if string.len(token) > 0
        nums = append_parsed(nums, token)
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(token) > 0
    nums = append_parsed(nums, token)
  end

  mut maxes: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = 0
  mut j = 0
  let len = nums.len()
  while j < len
    let v = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if j == 0
      cur = v
    else if v > cur
      cur = v
    end
    maxes = list.push(maxes, cur)
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  let mlen = maxes.len()
  while k < mlen
    let v = match maxes.get(k)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
end

fn append_parsed(_ xs: List<Int>, _ tok: String) -> List<Int>
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    list.push(xs, v)
  when None
    xs
  end
end
